---
title: "AHRQ Data Integration and Feature Engineering"
author: "Chase Fensore"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Setup and Dependencies

```{r libraries}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(caret)
library(usmap)
library(sf)
library(rio)  
library(sp) 
library(maps)

# Load custom data cleaning functions
source('data_cleaners.R')
```

## 1. Load AHRQ Data (County and Tract Level)

```{r load-ahrq}
# 1.1 Load County AHRQ Data (2010-2018)
cty_files <- c(
  "./COUNTY_AHRQ/SDOH_2010_COUNTY_1_0.csv", "./COUNTY_AHRQ/SDOH_2011_COUNTY_1_0.csv",
  "./COUNTY_AHRQ/SDOH_2012_COUNTY_1_0.csv", "./COUNTY_AHRQ/SDOH_2013_COUNTY_1_0.csv",
  "./COUNTY_AHRQ/SDOH_2014_COUNTY_1_0.csv", "./COUNTY_AHRQ/SDOH_2015_COUNTY_1_0.csv",
  "./COUNTY_AHRQ/SDOH_2016_COUNTY_1_0.csv", "./COUNTY_AHRQ/SDOH_2017_COUNTY_1_0.csv",
  "./COUNTY_AHRQ/SDOH_2018_COUNTY_1_1.csv"
)
cty_ahrq_total <- rbindlist(lapply(cty_files, read.csv), fill = TRUE)

# Rename features with countylevel suffix
cty_features_nosuffix <- colnames(cty_ahrq_total)
exclude_columns_cty <- c("COUNTY", "COUNTYFIPS", "REGION", "STATE", "STATEFIPS", "TERRITORY", "YEAR")

cty_ahrq_total <- cty_ahrq_total %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(., "_countylevel"), -any_of(exclude_columns_cty))

# 1.2 Load Tract AHRQ Data (2010-2018)
trct_files <- paste0("./TRACT_AHRQ/sdoh_", 2010:2018, "_tract_1_0.csv")
tr_ahrq_total <- rbindlist(lapply(trct_files, read.csv), fill = TRUE)

# Rename features with census_tractlevel suffix
trct_features_nosuffix <- colnames(tr_ahrq_total)
exclude_columns_trct <- c("COUNTY", "COUNTYFIPS", "REGION", "STATE", "STATEFIPS", "TERRITORY", "TRACTFIPS", "YEAR")

tr_ahrq_total <- tr_ahrq_total %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(., "_census_tractlevel"), -any_of(exclude_columns_trct))
```

## 2. AHRQ Metadata Dictionary Processing

```{r ahrq-metadata}
# Load metadata dictionary
all_gran_feats_metadata <- readxl::read_excel("2010-18-all-granularities-AHRQ-dict.xlsx") 

# Format Domain strings
all_gran_feats_metadata <- all_gran_feats_metadata %>%
  mutate(Domain = str_to_lower(stringi::stri_trans_general(Domain, "Latin-ASCII")))

# Extract and suffix metadata for County level
cty_features_and_metadata <- all_gran_feats_metadata %>%
  filter(`Variable Name` %in% cty_features_nosuffix) %>%
  mutate(`Variable Name` = if_else(`Variable Name` %in% exclude_columns_cty, 
                                   `Variable Name`, 
                                   paste0(`Variable Name`, "_countylevel")))

# Extract and suffix metadata for Tract level
trct_features_and_metadata <- all_gran_feats_metadata %>%
  filter(`Variable Name` %in% trct_features_nosuffix) %>%
  mutate(`Variable Name` = if_else(`Variable Name` %in% exclude_columns_trct, 
                                   `Variable Name`, 
                                   paste0(`Variable Name`, "_census_tractlevel")))

cat("Overall County Variables:", nrow(cty_features_and_metadata), "\n")
cat("Overall Tract Variables:", nrow(trct_features_and_metadata), "\n")

# Save Variable names for LLM Prompts (Excluding Geography & Identifiers)
llm_tract_AHRQ_prompts <- trct_features_and_metadata %>%
  rename(
    domain = Domain, SDOH_topic = Topic,
    variable_name = `Variable Name`, variable_label = `Variable Label`, data_source = `Data Source`
  ) %>%
  filter(!(domain %in% c("6. geography", "identifier")))

write.csv(llm_tract_AHRQ_prompts, "AHRQ_tract_varnames_2010-2018.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## 3. Load Geocoded Patient Cohort and Merge ADI / SDI

```{r load-patient-cohort}
patient_cohort <- read.csv("./Nonmissing_Cohort.csv")

# Standardize padding for FIPS and Tract
patient_cohort <- patient_cohort %>%
  mutate(
    censustract = str_pad(as.character(censustract), width = 11, pad = "0"),
    fips = str_pad(as.character(fips), width = 5, pad = "0")
  )

# Read ADI and format FIPS
adi_tract <- read.csv("./adi-download-2020-tract/US_2020_ADI_Census_Block_Group_v4_0_1.csv") %>%
  mutate(FIPS = str_pad(substr(as.character(FIPS), 1, 11), width = 11, pad = "0"))

# Read SDI and format FIPS
sdi_censustract <- read.csv("./sdi-download-2019-tract/rgcsdi-2015-2019-censustract.csv") %>%
  mutate(CENSUSTRACT_FIPS = str_pad(as.character(CENSUSTRACT_FIPS), width = 11, pad = "0"))

# 3.1 Fill Missing ADI (sampling 1 random ADI block per tract)
adi_tract_random <- adi_tract %>%
  group_by(FIPS) %>%
  sample_n(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(FIPS, ADI_NATRANK)

patient_cohort <- patient_cohort %>%
  left_join(adi_tract_random, by = c("censustract" = "FIPS")) %>%
  mutate(ADI_national_rank = coalesce(ADI_national_rank, ADI_NATRANK)) %>%
  select(-ADI_NATRANK)

# 3.2 Fill Missing SDI
sdi_merge_cols <- c("PovertyLT100_FPL_score", "Single_Parent_Fam_score", "Education_LT12years_score", 
                    "HHNo_Vehicle_score", "HHRenter_Occupied_score", "HHCrowding_score", 
                    "Nonemployed_score", "pct_Poverty_LT100", "pct_Single_Parent_Fam", 
                    "pct_Education_LT12years", "pct_NonEmployed", "pctHH_No_Vehicle", 
                    "pctHH_Renter_Occupied", "pctHH_Crowding", "SDI_score")

patient_cohort <- patient_cohort %>%
  left_join(sdi_censustract %>% select(CENSUSTRACT_FIPS, all_of(sdi_merge_cols)), 
            by = c("censustract" = "CENSUSTRACT_FIPS")) %>%
  mutate(sdi = coalesce(sdi, SDI_score)) %>%
  select(-SDI_score)
```

## 4. Merge Social Vulnerability Index (SVI)

```{r merge-svi}
SVI_2014_US <- read.csv("./TRACT_AHRQ/SVI_2014_US.csv") %>%
  mutate(FIPS = sprintf("%011s", as.character(FIPS)))

# Deduplicated list of SVI columns to keep
keep_svi <- unique(c(
  "FIPS", "SPL_THEMES", "RPL_THEME1", "RPL_THEME2", "RPL_THEME3", "RPL_THEME4", "RPL_THEMES", 
  "EPL_POV", "EPL_UNEMP", "EPL_PCI", "EPL_NOHSDP", "EPL_AGE65", "EPL_AGE17", "EPL_DISABL", 
  "EPL_SNGPNT", "EPL_MINRTY", "EPL_LIMENG", "EPL_MUNIT", "EPL_MOBILE", "EPL_CROWD", 
  "EPL_NOVEH", "EPL_GROUPQ", "F_TOTAL", "E_HU", "E_HH", "E_POV", "E_UNEMP", "E_PCI", 
  "E_NOHSDP", "E_AGE65", "E_AGE17", "E_DISABL", "E_SNGPNT", "E_MINRTY", "E_LIMENG", 
  "E_MUNIT", "E_MOBILE", "E_CROWD", "E_NOVEH", "E_GROUPQ", "EP_POV", "EP_UNEMP", "EP_PCI", 
  "EP_NOHSDP", "EP_AGE65", "EP_AGE17", "EP_DISABL", "EP_SNGPNT", "EP_MINRTY", "EP_LIMENG", 
  "EP_MUNIT", "EP_MOBILE", "EP_CROWD", "EP_NOVEH", "EP_GROUPQ"
))

SVI_2014_US <- SVI_2014_US %>% select(all_of(keep_svi))

patient_cohort <- patient_cohort %>%
  left_join(SVI_2014_US, by = c("censustract" = "FIPS"))
```

## 5. Merge AHRQ Data and Perform Feature Engineering

```{r merge-ahrq}
# Pad AHRQ geospatial keys
cty_ahrq_total$COUNTYFIPS_padded <- sprintf("%05s", as.character(cty_ahrq_total$COUNTYFIPS))
tr_ahrq_total$TRACTFIPS_padded <- sprintf("%011s", as.character(tr_ahrq_total$TRACTFIPS))

# Merge County AHRQ and coalesce duplicates
patient_cohort <- patient_cohort %>%
  left_join(cty_ahrq_total, by = c("fips" = "COUNTYFIPS_padded", "baselineyear" = "YEAR")) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with(".x"), ~ coalesce(.x, get(sub("\\.x$", ".y", cur_column()))))) %>%
  rename_with(~ sub("\\.x$", "", .), ends_with(".x")) %>%
  select(-ends_with(".y"))

# Merge Tract AHRQ and coalesce duplicates
patient_cohort <- patient_cohort %>%
  left_join(tr_ahrq_total, by = c("censustract" = "TRACTFIPS_padded", "baselineyear" = "YEAR")) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with(".x"), ~ coalesce(.x, get(sub("\\.x$", ".y", cur_column()))))) %>%
  rename_with(~ sub("\\.x$", "", .), ends_with(".x")) %>%
  select(-ends_with(".y"))

cat("Total merged patient cohort rows:", nrow(patient_cohort), "\n")
```

```{r engineering-and-phi-drop}
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# TO-DO: Insert code to drop PHI here, as desired.
# Example: patient_cohort <- patient_cohort %>% select(-First_Name, -SSN)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

# Feature Engineering: Subgroups, Demographics, and Comorbidities
patient_cohort <- patient_cohort %>%
  mutate(
    baselineyear = as.numeric(baselineyear),
    
    # Demographics
    blackorwhite = if_else(black == 1 | white == 1, 1, 0),
    male = if_else(female == 0, 1, 0),
    
    # Intersectional Subgroups
    white_male   = if_else(white == 1 & female == 0, 1, 0),
    black_male   = if_else(black == 1 & female == 0, 1, 0),
    other_male   = if_else(other == 1 & female == 0, 1, 0),
    white_female = if_else(white == 1 & female == 1, 1, 0),
    black_female = if_else(black == 1 & female == 1, 1, 0),
    other_female = if_else(other == 1 & female == 1, 1, 0),
    
    # Inverse Comorbidities
    no_htn = if_else(htn == 0, 1, 0),
    no_cad = if_else(cad == 0, 1, 0),
    no_ckd = if_else(ckd == 0, 1, 0)
  )
```

## 6. Helper Functions for Folds and Missingness

```{r functions}
# Prepares data matrix: quartile age splits, CCI categorical flags, and Cross-Validation folds
prepare_inputDF <- function(total_df) {
  
  quarts <- quantile(total_df$age_current, probs = seq(0, 1, 0.25), na.rm = TRUE)
  CCI_quarts <- quantile(total_df$cci, probs = seq(0, 1, 0.25), na.rm = TRUE)
  
  total_df <- total_df %>%
    mutate(
      # Age Quartiles
      age_Q1 = if_else(age_current <= quarts[2], 1, 0),
      age_Q2 = if_else(age_current > quarts[2] & age_current <= quarts[3], 1, 0),
      age_Q3 = if_else(age_current > quarts[3] & age_current <= quarts[4], 1, 0),
      age_Q4 = if_else(age_current > quarts[4], 1, 0),
      
      # CCI Single Digits
      CCI_0 = if_else(cci == 0, 1, 0),
      CCI_1 = if_else(cci == 1, 1, 0),
      CCI_2 = if_else(cci == 2, 1, 0),
      CCI_3 = if_else(cci == 3, 1, 0),
      CCI_4 = if_else(cci == 4, 1, 0),
      CCI_5 = if_else(cci == 5, 1, 0),
      CCI_6 = if_else(cci == 6, 1, 0),
      CCI_7up = if_else(cci >= 7, 1, 0),
      
      # CCI Quartiles
      CCI_Q1 = if_else(cci <= CCI_quarts[2], 1, 0),
      CCI_Q2 = if_else(cci > CCI_quarts[2] & cci <= CCI_quarts[3], 1, 0),
      CCI_Q3 = if_else(cci > CCI_quarts[3] & cci <= CCI_quarts[4], 1, 0),
      CCI_Q4 = if_else(cci > CCI_quarts[4], 1, 0)
    )
  
  # Create 10 folds for nested k-fold CV
  endpoints <- c("readmit30bin", "death30bin", "composite30")
  total_df <- create_folds(as.data.frame(total_df), endpoints) 
  
  return(total_df)
}

# Calculates and logs missingness rates across domains
calculate_missing_rates <- function(input_df, cty_meta, trct_meta, output_file) {
  
  all_var_info <- data.frame(
    Variable = c(cty_meta$`Variable Name`, trct_meta$`Variable Name`),
    Domain = c(cty_meta$Domain, trct_meta$Domain)
  )
  
  missing_non_numeric_rates <- sapply(all_var_info$Variable, function(col) {
    if (col %in% names(input_df)) {
      mean(is.na(input_df[[col]]) | !is.numeric(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(input_df[[col]]))))) * 100
    } else {
      NA
    }
  })
  
  all_var_info$MissingRate <- missing_non_numeric_rates
  all_var_info <- all_var_info[!is.na(all_var_info$MissingRate), ]
  
  write.csv(all_var_info, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Missing rates saved to:", output_file, "\n")
  return(all_var_info)
}

# Safely casts strings to numeric, coercing garbage strings to NA
convert_nonnumeric_to_na <- function(df, columns) {
  for(col in columns) {
    if(col %in% names(df)) {
      df[[col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[col]]))
    }
  }
  return(df)
}
```

## 7. Generate Final Output Matrix

```{r execute-pipeline}
# Clean specific deprivation columns
deprivation_cols_total <- c("percnt_ltfpl100", "percnt_singlparntfly", "percnt_dropout", 
                            "percnt_hhnocar", "percnt_rentoccup", "percnt_crowding", 
                            "percnt_nonemp", "percnt_unemp", "percnt_highneeds", 
                            "percnt_hispanic", "percnt_frgnborn", "percnt_black", 
                            "sdi", "ADI_state_rank", "ADI_national_rank")

patient_cohort <- convert_nonnumeric_to_na(patient_cohort, deprivation_cols_total)

# Final formatting
patient_cohort_final <- prepare_inputDF(patient_cohort)

# Analyze missingness
missing_rates_df <- calculate_missing_rates(
  patient_cohort_final, 
  cty_features_and_metadata, 
  trct_features_and_metadata, 
  "missing_rates_final_allstates_modelinput.csv"
)

# Identify Encounters excluded during filtering logic
patients_excluded <- patient_cohort %>% 
  filter(!Encounter %in% patient_cohort_final$Encounter)

# Write out finalized modeling cohort
write.csv(patient_cohort_final, file = "./final_allstates_modelinput.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("Final Modeling DataFrame prepared. N =", nrow(patient_cohort_final), "\n")
```
